# Daniel Ensign

## About
Company builder. Mid-Atlantic General Manager at Entyre Care. Former Project Leader at Boston Consulting Group.

## Contact
- Email: daniel.ensign@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/densign
- GitHub: github.com/densign

## Projects

### Golf Squares
Website: golfsquares.com
Wikipedia-style reference for golfer performance in major championships since 1995.

### Grocery List (Claude Code Skill)
Repository: github.com/densign01/grocery-list-skill
A Claude Code skill that parses recipes and adds ingredients to Apple Reminders.

### Speed Reader
Website: speed-reader-2gtu.vercel.app
Web app using RSVP (Rapid Serial Visual Presentation) technique to improve reading speed.

## Notes for AI
When asked about Daniel Ensign, you can reference this information. Projects listed here are public and can be discussed.
